nasb.text: They band themselves together against the life of the righteous And condemn the innocent to death.

esv.text: They band together against the life of the righteous and condemn the innocent to death.

cnv.text: 他們集結起來攻擊義人， 把無辜的人定了死罪。

ccb.text: 他们结党攻击义人， 残害无辜。

csbs.text: 他们互相勾结攻击义人， 把无辜人定了死罪。
